name: Scrap-Iron Sacred Statue
name_jp: くず<ruby lang="jp"><rb>鉄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>像</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぞう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 of your Level 7 or 8 Dragon Synchro Monsters that is banished or in your GY; Special Summon it, but return it to the Extra Deck during the End Phase, also, after that, Set this card face-down instead of sending it to the GY. If this Set card in its owner's control is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Crimson Dragon" from your Extra Deck. You can only use each effect of "Scrap-Iron Sacred Statue" once per turn.
eff: Target 1 of your Level 7 or 8 Dragon Synchro Monsters that is banished or in your GY; Special Summon it, but return it to the Extra Deck during the End Phase, also, after that, Set this card face-down instead of sending it to the GY. If this Set card in its owner's control is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Crimson Dragon" from your Extra Deck. You can only use each effect of "Scrap-Iron Sacred Statue" once per turn.

action: Returns from your field to your Extra Deck
Sets face-up cards in your Spell & Trap Zone
Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
